text: I stand before the glass, the threshold of a curated world. The corridor is empty, the faint hum of distant technology lingers, and my own reflection is layered over the exhibit beyond. It is as though I am on the verge of discovery, about to enter a space devoted to exploration and thought. The atmosphere is both sterile and expectant, inviting reverence but stirring curiosity. I wonder how much of myself will change as I cross this border from the practical to the speculative.
